sentences.english: My dream house would be by the ocean.
I want to wake up every morning and see the water.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 일어나서 바다를 보고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I'd love a house in the mountains with a big fireplace.
sentences.korean: 큰 벽난로가 있는 산속 집을 원해요.

sentences.english: I want a modern apartment in the city center.
I love being close to restaurants, shops, and nightlife.
sentences.korean: 식당 가게 그리고 야간 문화에 가까이 있는 게 좋아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #81 — Morning Person or Night Owl
